notes: Canadian national standards body. **NOTE: name collision with Cloud Security Alliance (cloudsecurityalliance.org)** — the two are unrelated. CSA Group publishes the CSA standards covering electrical, mechanical, environmental, and increasingly information-technology / privacy / cybersecurity topics. Paywalled via CSA Group store.

data.notes: Paid. Examples include Z246.1 (security management for petroleum and natural gas industry systems), and various IT/privacy-related Z-series.
